title: REBX: Multi-Channel Refurbished Commerce
summary: Owned RebX end-to-end across DTC and marketplaces — Shopify, eBay (190K+ sold), Back Market (88 products, 4.4★), and Temu (82 SKUs) — through unified grading, trade-in inventory, and channel-tier merchandising.
challenge: Refurbished tech requires trust at every touchpoint. RebX needed one operating model — certified quality, clear grades, warranty, returns — deployed across an owned Shopify channel and three marketplace reach layers, without fragmenting brand, inventory, or margin discipline.
strategy: Ran a four-tier channel architecture: Shopify as the DTC anchor, eBay as the volume engine, Back Market as the refurbished-native marketplace (4 years trusted, category-rated reviews), and Temu as a margin-screened discovery layer. Shared inventory logic and RebX Certified positioning tied the programme together.
implementation: Built RebX Certified Refurbished standard — 90-point quality check, four cosmetic grades, 12-month warranty — applied across all channels
Deployed trade-in valuation flow as the inventory flywheel feeding Shopify, eBay, Back Market, and Temu catalogues
Established channel-tier pricing and listing rules to protect margin on discovery channels while maximising reach on eBay and Back Market
Unified PDP trust architecture: grading guides, warranty terms, and condition labels adapted per platform

highlights: Homepage hero with trust bar — free delivery, 12-month warranty, 30-day returns
Interactive 3D grading guide and trade-in programme
Klarna, Clearpay, and Shop Pay on higher-ticket refurbished devices
